trades.reasoning: RSI at 71.4 is overbought and the score dropped to 75 — rotating this capital into fresher momentum setups scoring 95 before the overbought condition causes a pullback.
Score 95 with RSI 67.7 in the ideal 55–70 bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20 — textbook entry on a risk-on day.
Score 95 with RSI 64.5, MACD bullish crossover, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge confirming institutional interest — strong setup on a NASDAQ-led day.

decisions.briefing: Strong risk-on session with NASDAQ up 1.7% and tech clearly leading. Cash was essentially depleted at $170, so I sold NSIT — it was drifting into overbought RSI territory (71.4) with a lower score (75) relative to today's best candidates. Proceeds fund two new high-conviction entries in NVTS and PTCT, both scoring 95 with RSI still in the healthy 55–70 momentum zone, filling two of our four open slots.

market_education.summary_en: Markets surged in a broad risk-on session today, with the NASDAQ outpacing the S&P 500 by more than 2-to-1, signaling that growth and technology stocks were the primary driver. This type of differential — tech outperforming value — typically follows positive sentiment around earnings beats, easing macro fears, or AI-sector tailwinds. With no major macro shocks on the table, investors rotated back into higher-beta names, pushing momentum stocks to fresh breakouts.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場呈現明顯的風險偏好格局，納斯達克指數大漲1.7%，遠超標普500的0.8%漲幅，顯示科技及成長股主導市場走勢。這種科技股跑贏價值股的格局，通常出現在企業財報超預期、宏觀風險降溫或人工智能板塊持續獲資金追捧之際。在缺乏重大負面衝擊的背景下，投資者重返高貝塔股，推動動能強勁的個股突破新高。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum rotation is the strategy of selling positions that have become technically extended (overbought) and redeploying that capital into fresher setups with better risk/reward. Today's NSIT sale — RSI 71.4, score dropping to 75 — is a classic example: the easy gains have already been captured, so rotating into NVTS and PTCT (RSI 64–68, score 95) means entering momentum that still has room to run before hitting overbought levels.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能輪動是一種主動管理策略，即賣出已進入超買區間（技術上過度延伸）的持倉，將資金轉移至技術形態更健康、風險回報比更佳的新標的。今日賣出NSIT（RSI達71.4、評分降至75）正是典型案例：主要漲幅已經兌現，轉入NVTS與PTCT（RSI介於64至68之間、評分95）意味著在動能尚未到達超買水平前提前佈局，以捕捉下一段升浪。
